reasoning: Zootopia 2 opens on November 26, 2025, which is the Wednesday before Thanksgiving. Films opening on Thanksgiving week historically have their 5-day opening grosses heavily diluted, meaning their traditional 3-day (Friday to Sunday) weekend box office is much lower than massive summer or December Friday openers. 2025 features heavy-hitting Friday opening competitors like 'Avatar: Fire and Ash' (Dec 19) and 'Superman' (July 11), alongside other major franchise entries. A Wednesday-opening animated family film has never commanded the highest 3-day opening weekend of the year, making it virtually impossible for Zootopia 2 to achieve the best 3-day opening weekend in 2025.
